findings.title: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds
findings.actual_results:
Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds

URL: https://www.samcomf.com/career-open-positions

Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.73 (foreground color: #ffffff, background color: #4788c8, font size: 10.5pt (14px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
- "Distributor corner" in Header section
- "Contact us" in Header section
- "+91 63572 22000" in Header section

Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.73 (foreground color: #ffffff, background color: #4788c8, font size: 12.0pt (16px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
- "New Investor" in Header section

Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.97 (foreground color: #ffffff, background color: #007bff, font size: 12.0pt (16px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
- "#drop_resume" in "VIRTUAL BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT MANAGER"

Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.4 (foreground color: #8b8b8b, background color: #ffffff, font size: 9.8pt (13px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
- "Department: MF - B2B Sales" in "VIRTUAL BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT MANAGER"
- "Department: Investments" in "VIRTUAL BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT MANAGER"
- "Department: Administration" in "VIRTUAL BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT MANAGER"

Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.4 (foreground color: #8b8b8b, background color: #ffffff, font size: 9.8pt (13px), font weight: bold). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
- "Department:" in "VIRTUAL BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT MANAGER"

Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.82 (foreground color: #ffffff, background color: #3f86cc, font size: 9.8pt (13px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
- "Copyright © 2024 Samco Asset Management Private Ltd. | All Rights Reserved" in Footer section

Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.82 (foreground color: #ffffff, background color: #3f86cc, font size: 9.0pt (12px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
- "Statutory Details" in Footer section
- "Terms & Conditions" in Footer section
- "Privacy Policy" in Footer section
- "Disclaimer" in Footer section
findings.incorrect_code:
Distributor corner Contact us +91 63572 22000 New Investor

Department: MF - B2B Sales

Department:

Department: Investments

Department: Administration

Copyright © 2024 Samco Asset Management Private Ltd. | All Rights Reserved
Statutory Details Terms & Conditions Privacy Policy Disclaimer
findings.recommendation: Adjust foreground/background colors so text and interactive controls meet WCAG 2 AA contrast thresholds (minimum 4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text).

findings.title: Images must have alternative text
findings.actual_results: Ensure elements have alternative text or a role of none or presentation URL: https://www.samcomf.com/career-open-positions Element does not have an alt attribute aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty Element has no title attribute Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="none" or role="presentation" - "img" in "VIRTUAL BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT MANAGER"
findings.recommendation: Provide meaningful alt text for informative images and use empty alt (alt="") for decorative images.

any.message: Element does not have an alt attribute
aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty
aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty
Element has no title attribute
Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="none" or role="presentation"

findings.title: Form elements must have labels
findings.actual_results:
Ensure every form element has a label

URL: https://www.samcomf.com/career-open-positions

The form control element is missing an accessible label (visible label or ARIA label association).
- "candidate_name" in "section#career_application_form"
- "candidate_phone" in "section#career_application_form"
- "candidate_email" in "section#career_application_form"
- "candidate_location" in "section#career_application_form"
- "candidate_experience_in_years" in "section#career_application_form"
- "candidate_relevant_experience" in "section#career_application_form"
- "notice_period" in "section#career_application_form"
- "department_position" in "section#career_application_form"
findings.incorrect_code:
<input type="text" id="candidate_name" name="candidate_name" class="form-input validate-input-login-form" placeholder="" value="">

<input type="tel" id="candidate_phone" name="candidate_phone" class="form-input validate-input-login-form" placeholder="" value="" pattern="[0-9]{10}" required="">

<input type="email" id="candidate_email" name="candidate_email" class="form-input validate-input-login-form" placeholder="" value="">

<input type="text" id="candidate_location" name="candidate_location" class="form-input validate-input-login-form" placeholder="" value="">

<input type="text" id="candidate_experience_in_years" name="candidate_experience_in_years" class="form-input validate-input-login-form" placeholder="" value="">

<input type="text" id="candidate_relevant_experience" name="candidate_relevant_experience" class="form-input validate-input-login-form" placeholder="" value="">

<input type="text" id="notice_period" name="notice_period" class="form-input validate-input-login-form" placeholder="" value="">

<input type="text" id="department_position" name="department_position" class="form-input validate-input-login-form" placeholder="" value="">
findings.recommendation: Associate every form control with a visible or programmatic label using <label for>, aria-label, or aria-labelledby.
findings.correct_code:
<label for="email">Email address</label>
<input id="email" name="email" type="email" required>

aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty
aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty
Element has no title attribute
Element has an empty placeholder attribute

findings.title: All page content should be contained by landmarks
findings.wcag_name: All page content should be contained by landmarks
findings.actual_results:
Ensure all page content is contained by landmarks

URL: https://www.samcomf.com/career-open-positions

Some page content is not contained by landmarks
- "Home career Careers" in "Careers"
- "Open Positions in All MF - B2B Sales Investments Marketing Marketing-Design Engi" in "section#career_vanacies_frm"
- "VIRTUAL BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT MANAGER Department: MF - B2B Sales" in "VIRTUAL BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT MANAGER"
- "AREA MANAGER - MFD CHANNEL Department: MF - B2B Sales" in "VIRTUAL BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT MANAGER"
- "DATA SCIENTIST Department: Investments" in "VIRTUAL BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT MANAGER"
- "EXECUTIVE - FRONT DESK Department: Administration" in "VIRTUAL BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT MANAGER"
- "div" in Page section
- "Basic Info Please take a moment to fill out the following details, our team will" in "Basic Info"
- "candidate_name" in "section#career_application_form"
- "Name" in "section#career_application_form"
- "candidate_phone" in "section#career_application_form"
- "Phone" in "section#career_application_form"
- "candidate_email" in "section#career_application_form"
- "Email" in "section#career_application_form"
- "Location" in "section#career_application_form"
- "candidate_experience_in_years" in "section#career_application_form"
- "Experience In Years" in "section#career_application_form"
- "candidate_relevant_experience" in "section#career_application_form"
- "Relevant Experience In Years" in "section#career_application_form"
- "current_ctc" in "section#career_application_form"
- "Current CTC" in "section#career_application_form"
- "expected_ctc" in "section#career_application_form"
- "Expected CTC" in "section#career_application_form"
- "notice_period" in "section#career_application_form"
- "Notice Period In Days" in "section#career_application_form"
- "Select MF - B2B Sales Investments Marketing Marketing-Design Engineering Complia" in "section#career_application_form"
- "Department Position" in "section#career_application_form"
- "Select All Naukri LinkedIn Website Internal Reference How did you find us?" in "section#career_application_form"
- "#customButton" in "section#career_application_form"
- "#fileName" in "section#career_application_form"
- "Submit your application" in "section#career_application_form"
- "Your application has been submitted successfully! we will get back to you soon" in "Your application has been submitted successfully!"
- "RTA Branches | Unitholders' Meet-up" in Footer section
- "Mutual fund investments are subject to market risks, read all scheme related doc" in Footer section
- "Copyright © 2024 Samco Asset Management Private Ltd. | All Rights Reserved Statu" in Footer section
- "Filing Complaints on SCORES Easy & quick 1. Register on SCORES portal 2. Mandato" in "Filing Complaints on SCORES"

findings.title: Select element must have an accessible name
findings.wcag_name: Select element must have an accessible name
findings.actual_results:
Ensure select element has an accessible name

URL: https://www.samcomf.com/career-open-positions

The <select> element is missing an accessible name (label, aria-label, aria-labelledby, or title).
- "department_position_list" in "section#career_vanacies_frm"
- "department_name" in "section#career_application_form"
- "source_from" in "section#career_application_form"
findings.incorrect_code:
<select class="form-input validate-input-login-form" id="department_position_list" name="department_position_list">

<select class="form-input validate-input-login-form department_name_dropdown" id="department_name" name="department_name">

<select class="form-input validate-input-login-form" name="source_from" id="source_from">
findings.recommendation: Each affected <select> needs a programmatically associated label. Add explicit <label for="..."> for these controls: "department_position_list", "department_name", "source_from".
findings.correct_code:
<label for="department_position_list">Department Position List</label>
<select id="department_position_list" name="department_position_list" class="form-input validate-input-login-form">
  <option value="">Select Department Position List</option>
</select>

<label for="department_name">Department Name</label>
<select id="department_name" name="department_name" class="form-input validate-input-login-form department_name_dropdown">
  <option value="">Select Department Name</option>
</select>

<label for="source_from">Source From</label>
<select id="source_from" name="source_from" class="form-input validate-input-login-form">
  <option value="">Select Source From</option>
</select>

any.message: Element does not have an implicit (wrapped) <label>
Element does not have an explicit <label>
aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty
aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty
Element has no title attribute
Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="none" or role="presentation"
